Home › Resources

Resources

Plain-language notes on tax and compliance for Mumbai businesses and individuals. We review these at least once a year, after the Union Budget.

Income tax return deadlines

ITR due dates explained: 31 July for individuals, 31 October for audit cases. Reviewed annually.

Read ›

GST return due dates

GST due dates explained: GSTR-3B by the 20th, GSTR-1 by the 11th for monthly filers; QRMP and annual dates too.

Read ›

TDS payment & return due dates

TDS due dates: deposit by the 7th of the next month; quarterly returns by 31 Jul, 31 Oct, 31 Jan and 31 May.

Read ›

GST ITC rules

Know when GST input tax credit is allowed, blocked, reversed, and time-limited under Indian GST law.

Read ›
